abilities.description: This ability provides a fast reuse version of Tigir's Insects.

abilities.name: Touch of the Cursed
abilities.description: This ability grants the Shadow Knight a chance to drain the life of his opponent any time he makes a melee attack.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Add proc to melee

abilities.name: Touch of the Divine
abilities.description: Sometimes when the masters of the divine pass on, they are returned to Norrath to continue their holy work. This ability provides clerics with a chance to return to life when they meet death. Each rank further improves the chance to return to life.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Chance to return to life with the blessing Touch of the Divine when you would otherwise die.

abilities.name: Tranquil Blessings
abilities.description: This ability turns the next group buff you cast into a beneficial area effects spell, hitting everyone within its radius, at the cost of doubling the spell's mana usage. May only be used while fast regeneration is active.

abilities.name: Tumble
abilities.description: Tumbling increases your chance to avoid incoming damage and increases your movement speed. While tumbling, your ability to deal damage will be lessened as you devote more energy to acrobatic movements.

abilities.name: Turgur's Swarm
abilities.description: This ability will slow your foe, causing them to do less damage with melee attacks.

abilities.name: Turn Summoned
abilities.description: This ability infuses a summoned NPC with elemental energy, causing it to continually take damage for the next 30 seconds.  Each additional level of this ability increases the damage done.  Occasionally a summoned NPC will react violently to the infusion of energy, potentially destroying it outright.

abilities.name: Turn Undead
abilities.description: This ability infuses an undead NPC with holy energy, causing it to continually take damage for the next 30 seconds.  Each additional level of this ability increases the damage done.  Occasionally an undead NPC will react violently to the infusion of holy energy, potentially destroying it outright.

abilities.name: Twinproc
abilities.description: This passive ability will give you the innate chance to perform a twinproc each time you proc a detrimental weapon based spell. Each rank will add a 3% increased chance to perform a twinproc.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Chance to cast a spell a second time.

abilities.name: Uncanny Resilience
abilities.description: Uncanny Resilience reduces the amount of damage sustained by incoming melee attacks. All ranks of this ability will slightly increase the total amount of damage that can be absorbed and the first three ranks will increase the duration.

abilities.name: Unholy Steed
abilities.description: This ability provides you with the power to call the ultimate unholy steed to your side.

abilities.name: Unholy Warhorse
abilities.description: This ability provides you with the power to call the ultimate unholy steed to your side.

abilities.name: Union of Spirits
abilities.description: This ability channels the energy of the woodland spirits on to a single target.  The concentrated energy provides an exceptionally fast heal and leaves the target with a brief period of regeneration. Additional ranks increase the stat bonus granted, as well as the healing amount.

abilities.name: Untamed Rage
abilities.description: Using this ability causes the berserker to fall into a rage, attacking their opponent with no thought of their own safety.  With each rank, the damage is increased, but the berserker's defenses suffer.  This ability functions as a discipline and does not stack with other disciplines.

abilities.name: Vainglorious Shout
abilities.description: With pride in your voice you shout, stunning several of your foes at once, while inflicting slight damage, and reducing their ability to resist spells. Additional ranks increase the damage inflicted and the debuffs applied to the target.

abilities.name: Valiant Steed
abilities.description: This ability provides you with the power to call a valiant unicorn to your side.

abilities.name: Veil of Mindshadow
abilities.description: Veil of Mindshadow enables an enchanter to phase themselves partly out of existence. This ability shields them from melee damage. Additional ranks in this ability increase how much damage you can absorb before Veil of Mindshadow fades.

abilities.name: Vengeful Spirits
abilities.description: This ability increases the power of any critical hits your damage over time spells will do to your enemy. Each rank increases the power of your critical damage. Requires Destructive Cascade rank 10.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Modify damage from critical damage over time by percent.

abilities.name: Vicious Smash
abilities.description: This ability increases the damage you do with your bashes. Each additional rank increases the damage inflicted.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Add a flat amount of damage when a specific melee skill is used.

abilities.name: Virulent Paralysis
abilities.description: This ability causes your target to succumb to a sudden, violent attack, after which they are frequently unable to move for a time. Each rank of this ability increases the amount of time that the victim remains immobile.

abilities.name: Virulent Venom
abilities.description: Each rank in this ability increases the chance that your weapon poisons will activate.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Modify proc chance of combat procs gained by spells or AAs by percent.

abilities.name: Visage of Death
abilities.description: This activated ability will cause you to assume the form of an undead creature. Your melee attacks will be augmented for a short time. Additional ranks boost the power of your attacks further.

abilities.name: Viscid Roots
abilities.description: Each rank of this ability reduces the chance that a rooted NPC will be freed by your damaging spells. The first rank provides a 12% increases of the protection provided by Enhanced Root, the second increases the protection by 13% and the third rank by 15%.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Modify chance of the casters root being broken by percentage.

abilities.name: Voice of Thule
abilities.description: Grants you an alternative version of your Voice of Thule ability. Additional ranks increase the level of hate given.

abilities.name: Volatile Arrow
abilities.description: This ability fires an arrow tipped with a vial of oil causing the enemy to take increased damage from fire for up to 18 seconds. Multiple applications will not increase the damage or extend the time.

abilities.name: Wake the Dead
abilities.description: This ability calls the shade of a nearby corpse back to life to serve the Necromancer. The soulless abomination will fight the target until called back to the afterlife some time later. The slave summoned by the first rank of this ability serves for 60 seconds, and each increasing rank adds 15 additional seconds.

abilities.name: Wall of Wind
abilities.description: This ability will summon a wall of wind that hurtles outward from your location. Any enemies struck by this wall of wind will be knocked backwards and hobbled for a time. Additional ranks increase the power of your wall of wind.

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.description: This ability will allow you to make your entire group immune to fear for 10 seconds per level of the ability.

abilities.name: Ward of Destruction
abilities.description: Use of this ability creates a stationary ward that damages every enemy within its range.  Increased ranks improve the damage of the ward.

abilities.name: Ward of Purity
abilities.description: Use of this ability creates a stationary ward that cleanses poison and disease from every player within its range.  Increased ranks improve the effectiveness of the ward.

abilities.name: Warder's Alacrity
abilities.description: Each rank in this ability increases your warder's chance to flurry attacks.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Chance for pet to perform a melee flurry.

abilities.name: Warder's Fury
abilities.description: Each rank of this ability increases the critical hit chance of your pet's melee attacks.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Modifies your pets chance to perform a critical melee hit by percent.

abilities.name: Warlord's Fury
abilities.description: This ability greatly increases the hate generation in your attacks for up to 2 minutes.

abilities.name: Warlord's Resurgence
abilities.description: This ability summons regenerative energies to flow through your body increasing healing by 300 hp per tick for up to 3 minutes.

abilities.name: Warlord's Return Kick
abilities.description: This ability grants you a chance to kick your opponent upon a successful riposte of a melee attack. Additional ranks increase the chance of a riposte with a kick.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Chance to do an additional riposte attack, or skill based riposte like Flying Kick.
Modify chance to riposte.

abilities.name: Warlord's Tenacity
abilities.description: This ability allows warriors to temporarily boost hit points to get through tough situations.  The exertion takes its toll, though.  These hit points dissipate over the course of a minute and leave the warrior weaker than when Warlord's Tenacity started.  Additional ranks increase the amount of hit points that are gained temporarily.

abilities.name: Weightless Steps
abilities.description: Years of training allows the monk to increase their base movement run. This increase does not stack with movement rate spell effects.

effectSummary.effectDesc: Modify base rune speed by percentage.

abilities.name: Whisperwind
abilities.description: This ability gives you the ability to randomly teleport a short distance forward.

abilities.name: Wrath of the Wild
abilities.description: Developed by the denizens of Tranquility as a deterrent to potential attackers, this ability will shield you with a single-hit, large damage barrier of thorns.  Additional ranks of this ability increase the amount of damage that is inflicted.
